articles.title: Your verifier is fake if it shares too much state with the agent
articles.summary:
Most agent verification fails for the same reason bad attention designs fail: you collapsed the roles until the checker can no longer point in a different direction than the actor.

articles.title: Security is not a vibe. It is a proof.
articles.summary:
Relying on a semantic filter to stop a malicious prompt is like relying on a polite conversation to stop a locksmith.

It is probabilistic. It is a suggestion. It is a vibe.

articles.title: Trust is a function of latency, not just accuracy.
articles.summary:
Accuracy is a static metric. Trust is a temporal one.
